Actions.Text: REFERENCE CHANGED TO WAYS AND MEANS

Title: Changes the dedication of the bridge dedicated to Detective Thomas M. Inman
Summary: Changes the dedication of the bridge dedicated to Detective Thomas M. Inman.
LawCode: Amd §344-r, Hway L; amd §2, Chap 398 of 2025
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the highway law and chapter 398 of the laws of 2025 amending the highway law relating to dedicating a portion of the state highway system to "Port Authority Detective Thomas Inman", in relation to changing the dedication of the bridge dedicated to Detective Thomas M. Inman
